omitted_behavior: thinking on by default on MiniMax OpenAI-compatible API
enabled_probe_result: invalid_params; live API rejects thinking.type=enabled and says allowed values are adaptive, disabled

disabled.best_for: compact JSON, teacher-facing suggestions, low-latency UI response

adaptive.best_for: harder classroom reasoning where extra reasoning trace is useful and small latency increase is acceptable

omitted_default_on.risk: slower and one simple-json timeout in this sample; avoid implicit default because behavior is less explicit

recommendation: Default to disabled for current prep-room structured JSON. Use adaptive only for explicit deep reasoning stages. Do not send enabled on the current OpenAI-compatible API path. Do not omit thinking accidentally.
